features.name: always_comb blocking assign to local variable
features.description: Code should include an always_comb procedure block with a blocking assignment to a variable that is only written (not read within the block)
features.snippet:
logic [31:0] var;
always_comb var = in0 ** in1;

features.name: variable write-only in always_comb procedure
features.description: Code should include a variable declared outside an always_comb procedure that is only assigned (written) but never read within the procedure
